headline: From PGA tournaments to practice courses: The best credit cards for golf
summary: Whether you're an avid golfer yourself or prefer to watch the professionals, CNBC Select covers the best credit cards for golf equipment and hitting the greens.

headline: Shares of travel and leisure companies are trading higher after President Trump's social media post indicated that the U.S. will work closely with Iran, and the countries have already agreed to several key points in the proposed conflict-resolution plan. Yesterday's two-week ceasefire agreement and easing oil prices support a warm industry outlook.

headline: What to Expect From Host Hotels & Resorts' Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Host Hotels & Resorts will release its first-quarter earnings next month, and analysts anticipate a single-digit FFO dip.

headline: Highgate to cease operations, lay off staff at troubled Miami hotel
summary: The hospitality management company is exiting the celebrity-developed Goodtime Hotel, which is facing a $149 million foreclosure lawsuit.

raw.headline: Highgate to cease operations, lay off staff at troubled Miami hotel
raw.summary: The hospitality management company is exiting the celebrity-developed Goodtime Hotel, which is facing a $149 million foreclosure lawsuit.
